---
title: ""
output: 
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
date: ""
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(leaflet)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(scales)

il_counties <- readRDS("data/il_counties.rds")
il_map <- st_transform(il_counties, crs = 4326)
```

```{r plot, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# create a highlight variable
il_map <- il_map %>%
  mutate(highlight = ifelse(turnout_rate < 0.60, "Below 60%", "Above 60%"))

# two color palette
pal_highlight <- colorFactor(
  palette = c("Above 60%" = "#d0cfc9", "Below 60%" = "#e67e22"),
  domain = il_map$highlight
)

leaflet(il_map, options = leafletOptions(scrollWheelZoom = FALSE)) %>%
  addPolygons(
    fillColor = ~pal_highlight(highlight),
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    color = "white",
    weight = 0.5,
    label = ~ifelse(turnout_rate < 0.60, 
                    paste0(county, ": ", scales::percent(turnout_rate, accuracy = 0.1)),
                    NA),
    labelOptions = labelOptions(noHide = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  addLegend(
    pal = pal_highlight,
    values = ~highlight,
    title = "Turnout Rate",
    position = "bottomright"
  ) %>%
  htmlwidgets::onRender("
    function(el, x) {
      var title = document.createElement('div');
      title.innerHTML = '<div style=\"position:absolute;top:10px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;color:#1a1916;z-index:999;white-space:nowrap;\">Counties Below 60% Turnout</div>';
      el.appendChild(title.firstChild);
    }
  ")

```
